epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ICHD-3 tension-type headache criteria; exclude secondary causes with red flags

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: hundreds of millions with episodic symptoms
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; self-medication common and medication overuse risk is significant

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Mostly clinical diagnosis; limited neurology access outside cities
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifestyle measures, stress management, sleep hygiene, simple analgesics; amitriptyline prophylaxis for chronic cases; yoga/relaxation often used
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Self-medication, medication overuse headache, and limited access to non-pharmacologic therapies
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost medications and culturally accepted stress-reduction practices (yoga/meditation)
